# Behaviour Book

> A free, private, browser-based tool for Australian primary school teachers to track student behaviour, spot patterns, and respond with evidence-based strategies. No accounts, no cloud, no data leaves the device.

## What it does

Behaviour Book helps teachers:
- Log positive and negative student behaviour in under 10 seconds
- Automatically detect patterns: recurring categories, hotspot locations, ratio drops
- Classify students into Tier 1 (universal), Tier 2 (targeted), or Tier 3 (intensive) support levels using the SWPBS framework
- Track the positive-to-negative ratio per student (target: 4:1)
- Surface follow-up reminders so nothing falls through the cracks
- Generate suggested next steps: CICO, FBA, BSP, restorative conversations, parent contact
- Produce weekly summary reports for leadership
- Provide a built-in strategy guide with evidence-based intervention descriptions

## Technical architecture

- Single HTML file (~3,500 lines) with embedded CSS and JavaScript
- Uses Alpine.js v3 for reactivity (loaded via CDN)
- No server, no database, no API, no analytics
- Data persists as a local JSON file saved/loaded by the teacher
- No cookies, no localStorage, no sessionStorage, no cloud storage
- Works offline after first load
- Mobile-friendly with iOS safe-area support

## Privacy

- Zero data transmission. All student data stays on the teacher's device.
- No user accounts. No email, password, or sign-up.
- Two external resources: Google Fonts (typography) and Alpine.js (UI framework). Neither receives student data.
- Compliant with Australian Privacy Principles. Full privacy policy available.

## Supported frameworks

- SWPBS / PBL (School-Wide Positive Behaviour Support)
- Berry Street Education Model (trauma-informed)
- Restorative Practices
- Custom school values
- Framework-free tracking

## Target audience

Australian primary school teachers (Prep/Foundation to Year 6). Approximately 163,000 primary school teachers across ~6,200 schools in Australia.

## Pages

- [Home](index.html): Landing page with overview and links
- [App](behaviour-book.html): The full application
- [Stories](stories.html): Four classroom scenarios demonstrating value
- [Privacy](privacy.html): Complete technical and legal privacy documentation
